pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration from legacy source/target properties to the modern 'release' property for JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'maven.compiler.source' and 'maven.compiler.target' properties are deprecated in newer Maven compiler plugin versions and do not support cross-compilation features like module-info.java correctly; using 'release' is required for proper JDK 21 compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Pin JUnit Jupiter dependency to a specific version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using 'RELEASE' version can lead to unpredictable builds or versions incompatible with the new JDK; pinning ensures stability and compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency version and scope for JDK 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may have issues with newer JDKs; updating ensures annotation processing works correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Lombok as an annotation processor.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit annotation processor path configuration, Lombok may not process annotations correctly in newer Maven/JDK setups.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Surefire plugin to support running JUnit 5 tests on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may not support JUnit 5 or JDK 21 properly; adding a compatible version ensures tests run correctly.
